title: No Pigs
description: A mod that gets rid of pigs
body:
![NO PIGS FINALLY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e27a074ac4c5d7fb63c09e945c24e8c6471a551.png)

# NO PIGS FINALLY.

## Have you *ever* wanted pigs to just... disappear?

Well guess what.. this is the mod for you.

---

### Features:

- **Pigs no longer spawn naturally.**  
- **Pigs don't spawn from spawn eggs.**  
- Actually...  
### **Pigs don't spawn. At all. Period.**

---

> _Why did I make this?_  
> I was bored. Pigs were annoying. End of story.

So yeah. Download it.  
**Say goodbye to pigs. Forever.**
